# Oxbridge English

> Oxbridge English is an online language-learning platform providing structured English courses, interactive grammar tools, translation resources, and educational content.

## Core Services & Courses
- [Course Directory](https://oxbridge-english.com/courses): Interactive directory of English learning modules, course bundles, and structured lessons.
- [Placement Test](https://oxbridge-english.com/placement-test): Online English proficiency assessment for new students.
- [Translation Tool](https://oxbridge-english.com/translator): Quick English-Spanish translation and language practice tools.

## Resources & Content
- [Blog & Articles](https://oxbridge-english.com/blog): Educational articles, language guides, and regional/environmental readings.
- [Grammar Exercises](https://oxbridge-english.com/grammar): Interactive exercises and practice modules.

## Contact & Platform Info
- [Contact Us](https://oxbridge-english.com/contact): Get in touch for course inquiries and support.
- [About Oxbridge English](https://oxbridge-english.com/about): Information about our methodology and teaching team.

## Optional Full Context
- [Full Site Map](https://oxbridge-english.com/sitemap.xml): Complete list of indexed URLs.
